lecture_context.lecture_title: Stanford CS224N: NLP with Deep Learning | Spring 2024 | Lecture 5 - Recurrent Neural Networks

unit.name: Roadmap, scale, and the deep learning resurgence
unit.description: Sets up the lecture and motivates why sequence models matter by connecting modern language model scale to the historical difficulty of training deep neural networks.
unit.summary: The instructor frames the lecture as a short review of extra neural-net concepts before moving into language models and then recurrent neural networks, with transformers deferred to later lectures [ts=9s] [ts=56s]. He motivates the topic by noting that modern language models are enormous deep systems, then reviews how backprop enabled hidden-layer neural nets in the 1980s and 1990s but deeper networks were long believed too hard to train until late-2000s and 2010s ideas reversed that stagnation [ts=177s] [ts=354s] [ts=422s].

key_points.text: The lecture roadmap is: extra neural-net concepts, then language models, then recurrent neural networks, with transformers later.
Modern language models are described as huge deep models with over 100 billion parameters.
Historically, deep multilayer networks were widely seen as too difficult to train and often worse than one- or two-hidden-layer nets.
A small set of seemingly modest ideas and tweaks helped restart progress in deep learning after years of stagnation.

kp_catalog.name: Deep learning resurgence from data, compute, and scale
kp_catalog.description: Why modern neural NLP depends on a set of training and modeling ideas that made deep networks workable after years of difficulty. Large-scale datasets, GPU computation, and neural architectures converged to unlock modern deep learning for vision.
kp_catalog.importance_rationale: Important because deep learning resurgence from data, compute, and scale formalizes how why modern neural NLP depends on a set of training and modeling ideas that made deep networks workable after years of difficulty, which later units use as core machinery rather than background context while roles split between gateway and supporting and importance labels split between critical and high.
